'''Torino Kyber''' was a member of the [[Kyber Royal Family]] and the son of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Natas Kyber|Natas]].

==Biography==
Torino was the overseer of [[Refinery Six-Two-Two]] and opposed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] meddling in their profits. If [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Sev Buzk]] would change the price to an unlikable amount, Torino would just block the shipments. Because of this, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Treyz Manech]] hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to depose the local monarchy, and Torino was killed shortly after the destruction of his refinery. The last words he ever heard were "Commander Buzk sends his regards."
